use_cases: Displaying health and fitness metrics like VO2 max with animated radial progress visualization
Showcasing individual performance indicators in fitness tracking dashboards
Presenting goal progress with animated number counting and visual indicators
Health monitoring applications requiring animated data visualization cards
Fitness and wellness apps displaying workout metrics in an engaging animated format
ai_summary: An animated metric display card featuring a radial progress bar with smooth fill animation and counting number effect. Built with Framer Motion for health/fitness data visualization, showing metrics like VO2 max with status indicators and descriptive text. Uses a clean, minimal card design suitable for fitness tracking dashboards and health monitoring applications.
